---
title: "dino_cross_entropy"
generated: true
description: "Self-distillation cross-entropy (DINO)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.metrics.contrastive`](../nitrix-metrics-contrastive.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:dino_cross_entropy -->
```python
dino_cross_entropy(student_logits: Float[Array, '... k'], teacher_logits: Float[Array, '... k'], center: Float[Array, 'k'], *, student_temp: float = 0.1, teacher_temp: float = 0.04, reduction: Reduction = 'mean') -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:dino_cross_entropy -->
Self-distillation cross-entropy (DINO).

The teacher distribution is centred and sharpened
($\operatorname{softmax}((\text{teacher} - \text{center}) /
\tau_t)$) and detached; the loss is its cross-entropy against the
student's $\operatorname{log\_softmax}(\text{student} / \tau_s)$,
summed over the `k` prototypes and reduced over the batch.  Centring
(subtracting a running mean) plus a low teacher temperature is what
prevents collapse.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:dino_cross_entropy -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `student_logits` | `Float` | `...` × `k` | — | Prototype scores `(..., k)`. |
| `teacher_logits` | `Float` | `...` × `k` | — | Prototype scores `(..., k)`. |
| `center` | `Float` | `k` | — | Teacher centring vector `(k,)` (maintained upstream). |
| `student_temp` | `float` | — | `0.1` | Softmax temperatures (teacher sharper, i.e. smaller). |
| `teacher_temp` | `float` | — | `0.04` | Softmax temperatures (teacher sharper, i.e. smaller). |
| `reduction` | `Reduction` | — | `'mean'` | `"mean"` (default), `"sum"`, or `"none"` (per-sample CE). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`. The self-distillation cross-entropy. With `reduction="none"` this is the per-sample cross-entropy retaining the leading batch axes; with `"mean"` or `"sum"` it is a scalar reducing over the batch.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:dino_cross_entropy -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `k` | kernel or basis components |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
